title: dortmanna surrepens
intro: Dortmanna surrepens, also known as the creeping dock, is a perennial plant that belongs to the buckwheat family (Polygonaceae). The medicinal properties of Dortmanna surrepens lie in its ability to act as a diuretic, helping to reduce swelling and alleviate urinary tract issues. The health benefits of this plant include its potential to treat conditions such as edema, kidney stones, and urinary infections due to its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. In herbal preparations, Dortmanna surrepens is often used in teas, infusions, and tinctures, typically in combination with other herbs, to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
